name: bookstore_explorer
description: Demo app showcasing pict-dataexplorer (the config-driven hierarchical data explorer) against the retold bookstore harness.

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Bookstore Explorer
ExampleApplication.Summary: The full-fidelity explorer against the live retold bookstore harness — Stores / Books / Authors drilling into 1:N, M:N and N:1 relationships across 10k+ records. Requires the harness on :8086, so it is documented but not staged onto GitHub Pages.
